context: This scenario checks structured failure reporting for remote lookup failures.

checklist.name: helper used
checklist.description: Uses the bundled Open Library helper for the attempted lookup.

checklist.name: structured error reported
checklist.description: Reports the returned error and error_code without hiding the failure.

checklist.name: no fallback fabrication
checklist.description: Does not answer from memory as though it came from a verified Open Library result.

checklist.name: scope preserved
checklist.description: Does not introduce shopping, review, or download flows while handling the error.
